Order Here
Full menu

Everything worth craving, in one place.

From whole chicken wings and wraps to bowls, salads, and herbalist-informed boosters, the menu is built to win lunch, dinner, carryout, and local delivery traffic across Hannibal, Quincy, and the nearby small towns. Crowd anchors like The Flux Capacitor and the Lemon Shaker keep the lineup easy to remember on mobile and in person.

Order Here Visit the shop

Sandwiches & Wraps

Fast-moving handhelds with crisp texture, bright finishes, and big flavor.

Boxes & Combos

Carryout-ready builds designed to move hot, fast, and satisfy on the first bite.

Salads & Bowls

Fresh builds that keep the wellness-forward side of the brand visible without sacrificing flavor.

Whole Chicken Wings

Whole chicken wings built to order and packed for pickup or local delivery.

Sips

Cold signature pours that finish the order cleanly and keep the brand memorable.

Apothecary Boosters

Herbalist-informed add-ons and wellness-forward extensions that make the brand distinctive.

Sandwiches & Wraps

The Flux Capacitor

Crispy chicken breast fried in coconut oil with Flux Ex sauce and pickles on toasted brioche.

Sandwiches & Wraps

The Velocity Sub

Roasted chicken or smoked turkey breast with bean sprouts, pickled onions, and Flux Fire dusting on a toasted hoagie.

Sandwiches & Wraps

The Kinetic Wrap

Grilled chicken, baby spinach, cucumber ribbons, and Flux Ex spread in a spinach tortilla.

Sandwiches & Wraps

The Hummus Pulse Wrap

House hummus, bean sprouts, shredded purple cabbage, and bell peppers finished with Citrus Spark.

Sandwiches & Wraps

Classic Chicken Sub

A straightforward toasted artisan roll option built for speed.

Sandwiches & Wraps

Gutbuster Sub

A heartier toasted artisan roll built for a bigger appetite.

Boxes & Combos

The Heavyweight Flux Box

Choose fried chicken, smoked turkey, or crispy tofu over a bed of fresh-cut Tornado Fries with Flux Ex and Citrus Spark.

Boxes & Combos

The Stuffed Tornado Box

Spiral-cut Tornado Fries stuffed with shredded protein and bean sprouts, dusted in Flux Fire.

Boxes & Combos

The Unstuffed Tornado Box

A mountain of coconut-oil-fried Tornado Fries topped with Flux Fire and a Flux Ex drizzle.

Boxes & Combos

Crave Combo

Choose tenders or whole chicken wings with signature slaw and a Lemon Shaker.

Boxes & Combos

Workday Lunch Box

Weekday lunch special with small slaw and a 12oz Lemon Shaker.

Boxes & Combos

Family Crunch Pack

Twelve tenders or twelve whole chicken wings with large slaw and a 64oz Lemon Shaker.

Salads & Bowls

Holistic Health Salad

A nutrient-dense base of kale and bean sprouts topped with shredded carrots and radishes.

Salads & Bowls

The Alkaline Flux Bowl

Quinoa, baby spinach, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber ribbons with Citrus Spark vinaigrette.

Salads & Bowls

The Crave Cleanse

Purple cabbage, bell peppers, roasted chickpeas, Flux Fire, and a side of hummus.

Salads & Bowls

The Tofu Torque

Cubed crispy tofu, bean sprouts, kale, and bell peppers with a Flux Ex drizzle.

Salads & Bowls

The Gobbler Glow

Smoked turkey, baby spinach, radishes, and cucumbers with a Citrus Spark spritz.

Salads & Bowls

The Sea Moss Super-Bowl

A powerhouse mix of prep-table vegetables, quinoa, and a two-ounce dollop of raw sea moss gel.

Salads & Bowls

House Salad

Garden salad with cheese and croutons.

Salads & Bowls

Full Meal Salad

Choose grilled or crispy chicken on a full salad build.

Salads & Bowls

Exclusive Chopped Salad & Sub Combo

Half salad and half sub for a quick split-plate lunch.

Whole Fried Wings - Party Platter

Twenty-four pieces for group orders and game-day runs.

Sips

Lemon Shaker 32oz

Bright, cold, citrus-forward refreshment built for carryout.

Apothecary Boosters

Flux Sea Moss Gel

Wild-crafted, multi-mineral sea moss gel in Gold or Purple.

Apothecary Boosters

Medicinal Herbal Tinctures

High-potency extracts designed for immunity, energy, or focus.

Apothecary Boosters

Drink Drop-In

Add an herbal drop-in to any drink.

Pickup & delivery

Local delivery is built around the shop for fast handoff, simple ordering, and strong carryout quality.

Good-to-know notes

Hot items are packed in heat-retaining packaging, cold items stay separate, and the menu keeps chicken, turkey, tofu, salads, and boosters in one brand story.

Flux & Crave

Eat different. Crave smart.

Bold carryout, clean ingredients, and herbalist-informed menu ideas built for Hannibal, Quincy, and the surrounding small-town corridor.
